basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has released the official Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. JIP/EM&T/F-MA/DRONE-TRAUMA Project/2026/01 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JIPMER Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Applications, Computer Science, Information Technology, or Communication Engineering along with one year of field experience can apply through email mode up to 14-06-202

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree – Computer Applications / Computer Science / Information Technology / Communication Engineering with 1-year field experience
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree – Computer Applications / Computer Science / Information Technology / Communication Engineering with 1-year field experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Technical Support - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Project Technical Support - I position is 14th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Applications, Computer Science, Information Technology, or Communication Engineering, along with at least one year of field experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - I role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Technical Support - I post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure you follow the instructions carefully.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job position.
